title: Chef Craft Classic Plastic Shot Glass Measurer, 1 ounce teaspoon/tablespoon, Clear
description:
About this item
Measures up to one ounce in teaspoons, ML and tablespoons
Great for measuring drink amounts
Can be used instead of a teaspoon in baking
Made of clear plastic
Top rack dishwasher safe
reviews_5s: It's great to use for a medicine cupWorks well, would buy more if they don't last forever lolLiked the product and the priceWorked perfectly, just as described!Bought a couple of these, primarily to use to measure out mouth wash; but mostly for a family member who loves to measure out olive oil for her health. Instead of uses shot glasses made out of glass that we use to collect from different states/organizations, she now uses a shot glass made out of plastic with measuring lines to let her choose accurately how much oil she wants to use. Very happy with this product over how intuitive and forgiving it is. If it breaks, it doesn't shatter and very easy to replace; which I highly doubt will happen with this product.Used for liquid meds. Love itGreat for small measurements.I needed a small measuring cup with ounces. This hit the mark and works well. No issues after washing. Glad I purchased this one!Makes taking medication very easy.I bought this for my liquid vitamin. And it works perfect
reviews_1s:
Overpriced and cheaply madeSo I should’ve read the title better. Was looking for glass and saw “shot glass” in the title and missed the “plastic” after. The plastic is hard but thin and cheap feeling, similar to a disposable wine cup. The small clear ones. I don’t see it lasting long. Did not pay much, but not sure if it’s worth it. Could find in local dollar store cheaper I’m sure.A very convenient measuring cup, I love the idea but I just made a huge mess by pouring out some medicine in it and then leaving it unattended only to find that it was leaking near the bottom of the cup. I never was rough with the cup and always gently handwashed it so it must be a defect or flaw in the design.Came in brokenUltimately I blame myself for not double-checking but I fully expected a "shot glass" to be made of glass, and this is made of plastic. It seems fine for measuring but it's not what I expected.Play Video
The description said these are glass and they’re NOT glass. $6 for a piece of plastic? No, thank you. Anchor has a shot glass measuring cup for .97¢.The fact that glass is put in the name is an intentional attempt to mislead buyers. It’s not useful for my application and unfortunately I opened this unusable plastic waste too late to return it.There are so many imperfections and chips in the plastic edge but it's not worth sending back for $4. I'll keep it for my camper. Don't expect to get more than dollar store quality.Bought to measure out MCT oil for my smoothies and it turned the plastic cloudy & the measurements came right off. Cheap & in the trash now.This "measuring" cup does NOT accurately measure liquids. Do not use to dispense liquid medications.
